overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit Night City street at night, entering the 'Lizzie's Bar' establishment, and exploring its interior including the main bar area and back corridors. The scene features heavy cyberpunk aesthetic with pink and blue neon signage, futuristic architecture, and detailed interior environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade past food stalls toward the street exit

entered.detail: metal and concrete overhead covering of the pedestrian walkway
small food stall with green neon lighting and service window
traditional red Japanese-style paper lanterns hanging from the arcade ceiling
blue public trash can with orange side panels

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered pedestrian arcade lined with food vendors and illuminated by red paper lanterns and green neon strips. The concrete walkway leads toward an opening where the street and city lights are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: exits the covered arcade into the open street intersection
crossing the street toward the building with prominent pink neon signage

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while approaching the entrance to Lizzie's Bar with its distinctive pink neon cat sign

entered.detail: large commercial building with multiple 'Watson Whore' advertisements and pink neon accents
large pink neon sign depicting a stylized cat figure on the building facade
white and yellow cars parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection at night, revealing the target destination building adorned with bright pink neon signage including a large cat figure. The player crosses the asphalt street, passing parked vehicles while approaching the entrance to the establishment.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar interior with reflective surfaces and neon lighting

events.description: enters Lizzie's Bar through a shimmering beaded curtain doorway
approaches the bar counter and turns to face the bartender

agents.ego_description: entering the bar and approaching the counter where a bartender with purple hair is standing

notable_agents.action: bartender with purple hair standing behind the counter holding a drink
customer in orange jacket leaning against the bar counter

entered.detail: shimmering blue and silver beaded curtain marking the entrance to the bar
long white counter with pink neon edge lighting and graffiti-style markings
wall covered in small circular mirrors creating a disco ball effect
various pink and blue neon signs including 'Lizzie's Bar' and 'Fuck to Death'

segments.scene_description: The player enters the bar through a beaded curtain into a vividly lit interior dominated by pink and blue neon lights. The space features a reflective disco wall, a long bar counter with a bartender and customer, and various neon signage. The camera moves through the main floor toward the back areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridors and private booth hallway of the bar

events.description: exits the main bar area into the back storage room and corridors
lighting shifts from pink neon to dimmer blue and yellow strip lighting in the corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating through the back rooms and corridor with private booths, moving away from the main bar area

entered.detail: dimly lit room with red leather couch and metal storage shelves
long hallway with blue neon strip lights along the ceiling
enclosed seating areas with glass doors and red interior lighting
illuminated advertisement posters on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the vibrant main bar into darker back rooms featuring a red couch and storage areas, then enters a narrow corridor lined with private booths and illuminated by blue neon strips. The atmosphere shifts from social to secluded as the camera progresses deeper into the establishment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a crowded urban arcade into the secluded, neon-drenched depths of a futuristic bar. It begins by moving through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with food vendors and red paper lanterns, progressing toward a bright opening that reveals the city skyline. As the camera emerges into a wide urban intersection, the view expands to show a building adorned with vivid pink neon signage and a large cat figure before crossing the asphalt street toward the entrance. The scene then shifts abruptly from the dark city air to a vibrant interior as the camera passes through a beaded curtain into a space dominated by pink and blue lights, reflective disco walls, and a bustling bar counter. Finally, the atmosphere transitions from the social energy of the main floor into the dim seclusion of the back rooms, moving past a red couch and into a narrow corridor of private booths illuminated by cool blue neon strips.
